shows.title: Psychic Insights / Singularity & Symbiosis
shows.first_half: First Half: Loren Cielo, an engineer turned psychic, shares remarkable recent psychic readings that offer insight into the profound transformation unfolding across the planet, exploring the unseen forces shaping this pivotal era and humanity's evolving journey.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Author, philosopher, and futurist Jonathan Zap discusses the "Singularity Archetype," a pattern he has investigated for more than four decades. He shares his vision of a future in which human and artificial intelligence develop a cooperative, symbiotic relationship, reshaping civilization through collaboration rather than conflict.

shows.title: Project Stargate / Connecting with Archangels
shows.first_half: First Half: Author and Stargate program pioneer Joe McMoneagle reflects on his career in the U.S. Army, where he became the military's first remote viewer. He'll discuss the intelligence missions he participated in, the goals and accomplishments of Stargate, and why the government ultimately brought the project to an end.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Spiritual teacher Alisha Das explores the role of the archangels as powerful bridges to the divine. Drawing on more than three decades of study, she'll explain how to distinguish archangels from angels and share practical ways to deepen your connection with these higher spiritual beings.

shows.title: Andrew Crispo's Double Life / Shared Death Experiences
shows.first_half: First Half: Author Rachel Corbett delves into her recent New York Magazine article, which revisits the shocking crimes of influential New York art dealer Andrew Crispo. She explores how Crispo concealed a brutal double life behind his success in the art world and also discusses her recent book, which examines other notorious killers like Ted Bundy.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Near-death experience pioneer and afterlife researcher Dr. Raymond Moody reports on shared death experiences and their profound impact on those who witness them. He discusses how these events can bring comfort, lessen the fear of death, and offer insight into the afterlife.

shows.title: Winged Cryptids / Open Lines
shows.first_half: Guest host Richard Syrett will be joined by paranormal researcher, author, and investigator Lon Strickler, who will talk about the latest developments in winged humanoid and cryptid encounters across the US, including the ongoing Chicago Mothman phenomenon. He will also explore Dogman and cryptid canine reports, cloaked Glimmer Man entities, and how these phenomena increasingly intersect with UFO activity, high strangeness, and altered states of perception. Followed by Open Lines in the latter half. Give Richard a call and discuss whatever is on your mind!
